text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Fans chanting my name from the stands. But
also...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Your heart's desire for my triumph, for my return
to glory!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
On my honor as the Overlord... victory shall be
mine!
